channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: These Robots Are Making Meals for a Nonprofit in San Francisco’s Tenderloin
item.description: A nonprofit in the city’s most troubled district has turned to robotic meal prep tech to make up for a dearth of human volunteers.

item.title: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash, Xbox change de nom, Vente de SFR – L’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: Cette semaine encore, l’actualité tech a été marquée par l’offensive massive de Google dans l’intelligence artificielle, mais aussi par des annonces plus inattendues. Voici les articles les plus lus sur Frandroid, à ne pas manquer pour rester à jour.

item.title: Fraude à la carte-cadeau Apple : un réseau criminel chinois a détourné 47 millions de dollars
item.description: Des escrocs ont massivement détourné les cartes-cadeaux Apple vendues dans les rayons de grands magasins. En volant discrètement les codes inscrits sur les emballages, ils ont réussi à siphonner des dizaines de millions de dollars, utilisés pour acheter et revendre des iPhone, AirPods, MacBook et Apple Watch à travers le monde

item.title: 14 New Tools for Taking on the Great Outdoors Properly
item.description: It’s time to prep your kit ahead of the summer season. These tools will do the job.

item.title: Dyson's cheapest floor cleaner just got a $100 price cut — and it'll keep your hard floors looking spotless
item.description: The Dyson Pencilwash is a super lightweight cordless cleaner for hard floors, and it's spectacular value in the Memorial Day sale.

item.title: Mi-enceinte Bluetooth, mi-sono pour les petits concerts, la Bose S1 Pro+ perd 220 €
item.description: Polyvalente, puissante et facilement transportable, l'enceinte sono Bose S1 Pro+ peut animer une soirée karaoké ou prendre place sur la scène d'un concert dans une petite salle. Actuellement, Boulanger, Darty, la Fnac et Amazon l'affichent à 579 euros au lieu de 799 euros.

item.title: The best open earbuds in 2026: These picks stay put, sound great, and keep you aware of the world
item.description: We tested open earbuds from Shokz, Sony, Bose, and more — these were our six favorites.

item.title: Why Garlic Repels Mosquitoes and Keeps Them From Breeding
item.description: Garlic, as your grandmother may have told you, repels mosquitoes; it also completely blocks them from mating and laying eggs. Diallyl disulfide, it turns out, deserves the credit.

item.title: With 4G connectivity in addition to the usual Wi-Fi, the IMOU AOV PT is the ideal security camera for large properties
item.description: No Wi-Fi signal? No problem — this solid security camera has you covered, with solar charging and optional on-board storage for your videos as well.

item.title: AIs new cottage industry: Lawyers defending students accused of cheating
item.description: Some students accused of AI cheating are trying to save their college career with an attorney's help.

item.title: These near-mint condition MacBook refurbs are under $300
item.description: This MacBook Air has 8GB RAM and a 256GB SSD, and it's on sale for $270

item.title: No subscription, no stress: Office 2024 is $130 for life
item.description: Get lifetime access to Microsoft Office 2024 Home & Business for $99.97 and use Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook without a subscription.

item.title: Im watching the Canadian GP for free this weekend — how to live stream F1 for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the Canada GP in the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The best Memorial Day tech deals you can shop this weekend — save on headphones, laptops, and more
item.description: Here are the best Memorial Day tech deals on Mashable's favorite laptops, headphones, and more.

item.title: 60+ of the best Memorial Day deals: We found TVs, mattresses, headphones, and more on sale
item.description: Memorial Day is on May 25, but sales have already started. Shop live deals from Bose, Ruggable, TCL, Shark, Ninja, and so many more.

item.title: Memorial Day 2026 deals: Score free food from 7-Eleven, Dunkin’, Subway, Starbucks, and more
item.description: The best Memorial Day 2026 deals. Get free food from 7-Eleven, Dunkin’, Subway, Starbucks, and more.

item.title: The best 9 dating apps for men who are tired of being alone
item.description: Which dating apps for men actually work? We reviewed the top options for every type of guy, including Tinder, Hinge, and EliteSingles.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How AdultFriendFinder subscriptions appear on your bank statement
item.description: How do AdultFriendFinder subscriptions appear on bank statements. How to bypass the bank statements.

item.title: How to unblock porn sites and stream porn anonymously
item.description: Unblock porn sites and stream anonymously with the best porn VPNs.

item.title: 60+ Fathers Day gifts for Dad he wont have to pretend to like
item.description: Find the best Father's Day gifts for dads, from classic gifts he'll actually use to unique gift ideas you won't think of on your own.

item.title: Quel casque Bluetooth choisir à la place des AirPods Max 2 ? Notre sélection des alternatives
item.description: Si c'est bien l'un des plus performants du marché, le nouveau casque Bluetooth d'Apple ne s'adresse pas à tous les publics. Vous êtes à la recherche d'autre chose ? Voici notre sélection des meilleures alternatives aux AirPods Max 2.

item.title: Un collier IA pour « traduire » votre chien à 94,6 % ? Ce qu’en dit la science
item.description: Une startup chinoise vend un collier connecté censé transformer les aboiements et les miaulements en phrases françaises. Le tout avec 94,6 % de précision annoncée, et zéro étude pour le prouver.
